hooks.command: echo '[pleroma] session start — VAK routing active'
printf '%s\n' '[pleroma] user prompt submit: contract s4-prime.pleroma.gate.evaluate emits portal.vak_eval portal.lens_pressure'
printf '%s\n' '[pleroma] post tool use: contract s4-prime.psyche.update observes tool_result emits portal.tool_call'
printf '%s\n' '[pleroma] post tool use: contract s4-prime.pleroma.result.wrap with day now session emits portal.review_deposit portal.kairos_shift'
echo '[pleroma] session stop — Möbius return pending'
